_TZ3000_1o6x1bl0.notes: Uses standard ZCL clusters. Battery reported via genPowerCfg cluster. Buzzer controlled via custom cluster.

_TZ3000_gwkzibhs.notes: TS004F rotary knob routed away from generic button/switch drivers

_TZ3000_ja5osu5g.notes: Moes Smart Knob - supports single/double/long press via scenes cluster

_TZ3000_qja6nq5z.notes: TS004F rotary knob routed away from generic button/switch drivers

_TZ3000_v4l4b0lp.notes: P29 fix #170: was incorrectly routed to switch_1gang, causing sub-capabilities onoff.gang2/onoff.gang3 to be missing. Now routes to switch_3gang which has all 3 sub-caps.

_TZ3210_fgwhjm9j.notes: GitHub Issue #44 - 20A smart plug with energy monitoring

_TZE200_npj9bug3.notes: Homey forum #2091 TS0601 soil sensor: avoid curtain/climate fallbacks.

_TZE200_rhgsbacq.notes: ZG-204ZM is a 5-in-1 sensor like Aqara FP300: presence + temp + humidity + illuminance + battery. Uses both Tuya DP (61184) and standard ZCL clusters.

_TZE204_nklqjk62.notes: P29 fix #128: was incorrectly routed to contact_sensor (battery!), causing the device to pair with the wrong driver. Now routes to garage_door (mains powered) which has the correct garagedoor_closed capability.

_TZE284_aaeasoll.notes: Homey forum #2080 TS0601 light sensor: route to outdoor light sensor, not climate_sensor.

_TZE284_eaet5qt5.notes: Insoma 2-way irrigation valve: expose two on/off valves, not 4 dim levels.

_TZE284_fhvpaltk.notes: Homey forum #2082 Insoma 2-way irrigation valve: expose two on/off valves, not curtain/4-way dim fallback.

_TZ3000_u3nv1jwk.notes: Homey forum TS0044 4-button remote (_TZ3000_u3nv1jwk): route to E000/DP-capable button driver.

_TZE284_ne4pikwm.notes: Homey forum Nedis radiator valve: avoid climate_sensor fallback.

_TZE204_rzdkn5rx.notes: Hubitat-compatible Zemismart TS0601 rzdkn5rx 1-gang/boiler switch route.

_TZE28C100000_rzdkn5rx.notes: Homey forum 26439 #5484 exact Zemismart ZN-LRL1E/30A water boiler switch manufacturer code.

_TZE28C1000000_rzdkn5rx.notes: Normalized TZE28C1000000 prefix sibling for Homey forum 26439 #5484 Zemismart boiler switch.

_TZE200_xlppj4f5.notes: P29 fix #135: Immax NEO Smart Water Timer with solar charge. Was routing to climate_sensor (wrong class). Now routes to valve_irrigation which has the correct valve control.

_TZE204_xlppj4f5.notes: P29 fix #135: Immax NEO Smart Water Timer _TZE204 variant (newer hardware revision).
